training_status: strength training 3-4 times per week, no cardio

benefits.description: Lost 88 lbs in 6 months (from 286 to 198 lbs)
Maintained muscle while losing fat, though reports some muscle loss from previous peak

protocol_notes: OP mentions only Retatrutide in title/post. Diet: sweet potato, 93% lean ground beef, chicken breast, eggs, avocado. High protein, very low carbs and fat. Training: strength training 3-4x/week, no cardio. Multiple commenters (mylifestylepr, otto2424, SummitGeoDan) dispute that results were achieved on peptides alone and suggest concurrent use of testosterone, HGH, and other compounds, but OP does not explicitly confirm these. OP is evasive in responses and dismissive of claims. Timeline: 6 months (180 days). OP also mentions being 220 lbs shredded 3 years prior and gaining fat over 2 years before this cut.
